compiled_state.title: Create tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh with design-wireframe stub structural assertions
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## What
Create tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh with 3 structural assertions validating the design-wireframe redirect stub. Also update .test-index.

## Assertions
1. test_design_wireframe_stub_is_short: line count of design-wireframe/SKILL.md is less than 30 (validates stub compactness)
2. test_design_wireframe_stub_user_invocable: design-wireframe/SKILL.md contains 'user-invocable: true' (validates stub preserves invocability)
3. test_design_wireframe_stub_no_allowed_tools: design-wireframe/SKILL.md does NOT contain 'allowed-tools:' (validates stub has no tool restrictions — redirect stubs don't dispatch agents directly)

## File Structure
Follow the shebang + set -uo pipefail + source assert.sh pattern from other test files in tests/skills/.
Include a _TEST_GATE_ANCHORS array listing all 3 test names.

## .test-index Update
Add entry: plugins/dso/skills/design-wireframe/SKILL.md:tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh
(Append to the existing line 203 that maps design-wireframe/SKILL.md to other test files, or add a new line — whichever is consistent with the file format)

## File Permissions
chmod +x tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh immediately after creating the file.

## Acceptance Criteria
- tests/skills/test-redirect-stubs.sh exists and is executable
- All 3 assertions pass against the redirect stub created by 9b7f-64c0
- .test-index updated with design-wireframe/SKILL.md → test-redirect-stubs.sh mapping
- Test file follows existing tests/skills/ conventions

## testing_mode: GREEN
Source behavior (stub is short, has user-invocable, no allowed-tools) already implemented by 9b7f-64c0 before this task runs.

comments.body:
Gap analysis amendment: Create file at tests/scripts/test-redirect-stubs.sh (not tests/skills/). tests/scripts/ is the only bash-test directory wired into run-all.sh and validate.sh --ci. tests/skills/ has no bash suite runner, so tests/skills/*.sh files are only executed by the pre-commit test-gate, not by the full CI suite. Placing the new file in tests/scripts/ ensures full suite coverage.

.test-index update: append tests/scripts/test-redirect-stubs.sh to the comma-separated list on .test-index line 203 (the long-form design-wireframe/SKILL.md → many tests entry). Do NOT add a new standalone line.
comments.author: Test
